Event: Royal Challenge - Season 38
Event Date: 01/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI188
Oath of Tears

Once in a while the unit deals 196000 pure damage to the farthest enemy, then freezes them and all enemies in a small radius around the target for 3 sec. They can't move or attack for the duration. The cooldown of the affected units' gear abilities and artifact abilities is increased by 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
